new_jobs.title: Manager Data Analytics - Marketplace
new_jobs.why_fit: Manager-level analytics leadership at top-watchlist company in #1 priority geography; leads team of Data Analysts with A/B experimentation, geospatial data insights, and stakeholder strategy — direct match to Dushyant's 250+ stakeholder delivery and data-driven decision-making profile.

new_jobs.title: Manager Data Analytics - Payments
new_jobs.why_fit: Second concurrent Booking.com Manager Analytics opening in Amsterdam targeting Payments domain — Dushyant's fintech-adjacent program delivery and data governance background (Mastercard/Visa context) map directly to this role.

new_jobs.title: Manager of Data Management - Analytics Platform
new_jobs.why_fit: Third concurrent Booking.com Manager-level role focused on data platform governance and analytics infrastructure — Dushyant's Alteryx automation (50+ workflows, 10K hrs saved) and data quality program experience are highly transferable.

new_jobs.title: Technical Program Manager (Professional Services & Operations)
new_jobs.why_fit: Databricks (top-watchlist) has 35+ open Netherlands roles; this Professional Services TPM maps directly to Dushyant's $1M program delivery, Alteryx automation, and data platform transformation strengths at Deloitte and EXL.

new_jobs.title: APJ Technical Enablement Program Manager
new_jobs.why_fit: Databricks Singapore APJ-region program manager managing large-scale technical enablement programs; Dushyant's 10K+ hrs training delivery, cross-functional stakeholder management, and Six Sigma Black Belt align well — note role favours SaaS enablement background, which is a partial gap.

alert: WATCHLIST ALERT: Booking.com is actively running 3 CONCURRENT Analytics/Data Manager openings in Amsterdam (Marketplace, Payments, Analytics Platform) — all Manager-level, all in #1 priority geography NL. This is a rare simultaneous hiring window at your single highest-priority target company. Apply to all three this week. Databricks NL also has 35+ active roles — TPM in Professional Services is a strong secondary apply.
message: 5 roles found: NL x4 (Booking.com x3 fit 9-8, Databricks NL fit 8), SG x1 (Databricks APJ fit 7). Booking.com triple-open in Amsterdam is the week's top priority.
